incident_details.short_description: Custom Opportunity Business Process Flow not shown for sales users
incident_details.description: Sales users creating new Opportunity records are seeing the standard Sales Process instead of the custom Enterprise Opportunity Process. System Administrators can manually switch to the custom process.

resolution.root_cause: The custom Business Process Flow was active, but its security role access and process order did not make it the first eligible process for the Sales Professional role.
resolution_steps: Confirmed the custom Business Process Flow was active and associated with the Opportunity table.
Reviewed the Business Process Flow security role settings and added the Sales Professional role.
Opened the Business Process Flow designer and moved Enterprise Opportunity Process above the standard process in the process order.
Asked a non-admin sales test user to create a new Opportunity and verified the custom process loaded by default.
For existing Opportunities, used Switch Process where needed because process order primarily affects newly created records.

source_inspiration.title: Custom Business Process Flow not displaying on Opportunity
Business process flow order and security roles
